With our Jewelry ERP Software you can set Gold price, exchange old jewelry and book special orders for special occassions

Gold Purity & Clasification Set and manage the purity levels of your gold inventory with precision using our software. Classify gold pieces according to purity standards such as 24K, 22K, 18K, and more. Further categorize items into types like necklaces, earrings, bangles, and other jewelry categories. Our system allows for customizable classification, so you can create additional categories tailored to your business needs. This comprehensive classification system helps streamline inventory management, ensures accurate tracking of gold quality, and enhances organization within your jewelry business. With these features, you can easily maintain detailed records and manage your inventory more efficiently.

Set and manage the purity levels of your gold inventory with precision using our software. Classify gold pieces according to purity standards such as 24K, 22K, 18K, and more. Further categorize items into types like necklaces, earrings, bangles, and other jewelry categories. Our system allows for customizable classification, so you can create additional categories tailored to your business needs. This comprehensive classification system helps streamline inventory management, ensures accurate tracking of gold quality, and enhances organization within your jewelry business. With these features, you can easily maintain detailed records and manage your inventory more efficiently.

Gold Price

Gold Purity & Clasification Set and manage the purity levels of your gold inventory with precision using our software. Classify gold pieces according to purity standards such as 24K, 22K, 18K, and more. Further categorize items into types like necklaces, earrings, bangles, and other jewelry categories. Our system allows for customizable classification, so you can create additional categories tailored to your business needs. This comprehensive classification system helps streamline inventory management, ensures accurate tracking of gold quality, and enhances organization within your jewelry business. With these features, you can easily maintain detailed records and manage your inventory more efficiently.

Jewelry on Special Order

Handling special customer orders can be complex due to specific design and customization requirements. Our ERP software streamlines this process by allowing you to clearly define the type of order, delivery date, and other essential details. You can upload images and files related to the design, providing your workers with all the necessary information to accurately fulfill the order. This feature ensures that your team has a complete understanding of customer expectations, enhancing accuracy in manufacturing and reducing the risk of errors. By centralizing order details and visual aids, our software improves efficiency and helps deliver high-quality results.

Exchange Old Jewelry

When exchanging old jewelry for new pieces, our ERP software simplifies the process for sales staff. Easily capture all details of the old jewelry directly within the sales invoice. The system automatically updates the inventory ledger to reflect the received items and calculates their value. This value is then used to offset the cost of the new jewelry, ensuring a seamless and accurate transaction. By integrating these steps into the software, you streamline the exchange process, maintain precise inventory records, and provide a smooth experience for both staff and customers.

Inventory Ledger by Jewelry Type

Our inventory ledger provides comprehensive details for every piece of jewelry, including gemstones. With just a click, you can access complete information such as entry dates, current valuations, and other critical data. This feature ensures that you have instant access to a detailed overview of each item, helping you manage inventory efficiently. By consolidating all relevant information in one place, our software streamlines tracking and valuation processes, making it easier to maintain accurate records and make informed business decisions. This enhanced visibility supports better inventory management and operational efficiency.

Point of Sales

Classify gold pieces according to purity standards such as 24K, 22K, 18K, and more. Further categorize items into types like necklaces, earrings, bangles, and other jewelry categories. This comprehensive classification system helps streamline inventory management, ensures accurate tracking of gold quality, and enhances organization within your jewelry business. With these features, you can easily maintain detailed records and manage your inventory more efficiently.

Jewelry ERP Software

Our all-in-one Jewelry ERP software is designed to meet the needs of all types of jewelry businesses, including retail, wholesale, and manufacturing. This comprehensive solution integrates essential modules such as sales, purchase management, inventory control, stock valuation, and accounting. It also supports critical functions like landed cost management for importers, trial balance, profit and loss statements, and balance sheets. Hosted on a secure server, our software ensures global accessibility, allowing businesses to manage operations seamlessly from any location. The multi-currency feature supports international expansion, enabling transactions in local currencies and making it easier to open branches worldwide. With this robust system, you can streamline your processes, improve operational efficiency, and confidently grow your business across borders.
